name: Vicki's Cream Cheese Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 jar Armour Dried beef, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese.
2. Mix with the chopped meat and sliced green onions.
3. Add Accent to taste.
4. Divide the mixture into three parts.
5. In one part, mix in diced black olives.
6. In another part, mix in the remaining diced green onions.
7. Form all three parts into balls.
8. Optionally, roll the plain third in nuts.
